meta_title: Create a Website Online — AI Builder in 2 Minutes | Promto
meta_description: Create a website online with Promto's AI builder. No need to install anything — just describe your business in the browser. Ready website in 2 minutes.
og_title: Create a Website Online — Promto AI
og_description: Create a website online in 2 minutes with Promto's AI builder. Everything in the browser, no software to install, no code required.
hero_subtitle: Online builder with AI: describe your business in the browser — and get a ready website. No installation, no code, in 2 minutes.
hero_placeholder: Describe the website you want to create...

advantages.title: Everything Online in Browser
advantages.description: No need to install anything. Open your browser, go to promto.ai — and start creating websites.

advantages.title: Website in 2 Minutes
advantages.description: The AI builder generates a ready website immediately after your description.

advantages.title: No Code or Software
advantages.description: No programming knowledge needed. Everything works through a simple and intuitive interface.

advantages.title: Professional Result
advantages.description: The website looks like work by a team of professionals — modern design and well-thought-out structure.

advantages.title: Responsive for All Devices
advantages.description: The website automatically adapts to any screen size — phones, tablets, computers.

advantages.title: Hosting Included
advantages.description: Publish websites immediately on Promto hosting. No additional server payments.

how_it_works.title: Open the Builder
how_it_works.description: Go to promto.ai in your browser. No installation needed — work starts immediately.

how_it_works.title: Describe Your Business
how_it_works.description: Write a few sentences about your business: what you do, what services you offer.

how_it_works.title: AI Creates the Website
how_it_works.description: The neural network generates a ready website: structure, texts, colors, and images.

how_it_works.title: Publish
how_it_works.description: Click the publish button — and the website immediately appears online.

faq.question: How to create a website online?
faq.answer: Go to promto.ai, write a description of your business — and AI creates a ready website in 2 minutes. Everything works in the browser, nothing to install.

faq.question: Do I need to install any software?
faq.answer: No. Promto works entirely in the browser. Open the site, describe your business — and get a ready website.

faq.question: What kind of websites can I create online?
faq.answer: Any kind: landing pages, service websites, portfolios, sites for cafes, salons, workshops, and other businesses.

faq.question: How much does it cost to create a website online?
faq.answer: The basic plan is free. You can create up to 3 websites without paying. Paid plans unlock more features.

faq.question: Are technical skills required?
faq.answer: No. The builder is designed for people without experience. All you need is the ability to use a browser and write in Russian.

faq.question: Can I work from my phone?
faq.answer: Yes. The interface is adapted for mobile devices. You can create and edit websites from any device.

cta_mid_title: Create a Website Online Right Now
cta_mid_subtitle: Nothing to install. Just open your browser — and start creating your website.
cta_final_title: Your Website Is Ready to Launch
cta_final_subtitle: Create a website online in 2 minutes. No code, no software — just a browser.
